welcomeBody: Explore Ra's teachings in conversation. Answers are grounded in the Law of One concept graph and link back to the original sessions — they never reproduce the Ra Material itself.
citationTitle: Read the original at L/L Research
exportTitle: Law of One Study — Ask Conversation

thinkingPhrases.13: Connecting to the social memory complex...

disclaimers: Take what resonates, and gently leave the rest. These answers are an AI companion's synthesis of Ra's teachings — an aid to your own contemplation, not an authority.
This guide can make mistakes and flatten subtle ideas. Use your own discernment: keep what rings true, release what doesn't, and return to the original sessions when something matters.
Consider these words a doorway, not a destination. They are AI-generated reflections on the Law of One — hold them lightly, trust your inner knowing, and verify at the source.

sourceRaHint: Answers grounded in the trance-channeled Ra contact (1981–1984), cited by session and question.
sourceChannelingHint: Answers drawn from L/L Research's later conscious channeling — Q'uo, Latwii, Hatonn — attributed by source and linked to the original transcripts on llresearch.org. English only.
